sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69588" key="mwmhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μωμ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n69588.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must censure</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
